response.global_analysis: Verified audio matches song 'Rabbit Hole' by DECO*27. On-screen Japanese lyrics used as the primary guide for transcription. Excess JSON lyrics discarded as the video transitions to a dialogue segment at 02:35. Timestamps are precisely aligned with vocal onset and offset, ensuring tight wrapping of each phrase. English and Japanese dialogue transcribed and translated according to the spoken audio and scene context.

subtitles.original: Love, bluh-bluh-bluh-bluh-bluh-bluh-bluh-bluh
subtitles.english: Love, bluh-bluh-bluh-bluh-bluh-bluh-bluh-bluh

subtitles.original: ラブとライク パーティションはない、ない
subtitles.english: Between love and like, there is no partition

subtitles.original: 君だけが特別じゃないんだ
subtitles.english: You're not the only one who's special

subtitles.original: 反省とか私に求められても
subtitles.english: Even if you ask me to reflect on myself

subtitles.original: 本当、やんわり勘違いしないで
subtitles.english: Seriously, don't get the wrong idea

subtitles.original: で？で？で？
subtitles.english: So? So? So?

subtitles.original: どうしてなんで期待の戸締り忘れるの？
subtitles.english: Why do you keep forgetting to lock out expectations?

subtitles.original: 正直なほどやめ時なんてあったじゃん
subtitles.english: There was a time to stop as long as you were honest

subtitles.original: お嬢様、あちらが出口ですが
subtitles.english: Young lady, the exit is that way

subtitles.original: やっぱ、帰りたくないですか？
subtitles.english: But you don't want to go home, do you?

subtitles.original: ホップ ステップ ワンモアチャンス！
subtitles.english: Hop, step, one more chance!

subtitles.original: もうやっぱアピってラビったらいいじゃん
subtitles.english: Anyway, it's fine to show off and rabbit hole

subtitles.original: ポップな愛嬌振りまいたらいいじゃん
subtitles.english: It's fine to display your poppy charm

subtitles.original: みっともないから嫉妬しまいな
subtitles.english: Don't be jealous, it's pathetic

subtitles.original: 発火しちゃうとかぐずぐずすんな
subtitles.english: Don't dawdle about catching fire

subtitles.original: 寂しくなったら誰でもいいじゃん
subtitles.english: If you get lonely, anyone is fine

subtitles.original: 埋まればいいじゃん 埋めればいいじゃん
subtitles.english: As long as it's filled, as long as you fill it

subtitles.original: 嫌々愛して生きたくなって
subtitles.english: Living while reluctantly loving

subtitles.original: 死ぬまでピュアピュアやってんのん
subtitles.english: Being pure-pure until I die

subtitles.original: やっぱアピってラビったらいいじゃん
subtitles.english: Anyway, it's fine to show off and rabbit hole

subtitles.original: バッドなダンスを待ったらいいじゃん
subtitles.english: It's fine to wait for a bad dance

subtitles.original: やっぱり好きとかやってらんねーわ
subtitles.english: I can't do things like 'loving' anymore

subtitles.original: 馬鹿じゃない？くっそ、雑魚いわ
subtitles.english: Aren't you an idiot? Damn, you're weak

subtitles.original: 寂しくなったら誰でもいいじゃん
subtitles.english: If you get lonely, anyone is fine

subtitles.original: 埋まればいいじゃん 埋めればいいじゃん
subtitles.english: As long as it's filled, as long as you fill it

subtitles.original: 嫌々愛して死にたくなって
subtitles.english: Loving reluctantly and wanting to die

subtitles.original: こちとらフラフラやってんのん、OK?
subtitles.english: I'm just dizzy here, okay?

subtitles.original: バーストからインスタント・ラヴァー
subtitles.english: Instant lover from a burst

subtitles.original: 頭＋身体がバカに絡まる
subtitles.english: Head and body entangled in stupidity

subtitles.original: ゴーストならアンデッド・マナー
subtitles.english: If you're a ghost, undead manners

subtitles.original: 今だ乱ら今は火花散らせ
subtitles.english: It's messy now, make the sparks fly

subtitles.original: それがアンサーだ
subtitles.english: That's the answer

subtitles.original: ヤ ヤ ヤ 悪い子さん
subtitles.english: Ya, ya, ya, you bad child

subtitles.original: マ マ マ マ お愛顧じゃん
subtitles.english: Well, well, it's a draw

subtitles.original: さ さ さ さ 始めるよ
subtitles.english: Now, now, let's get started

subtitles.original: もっとこの穴を愛してよ
subtitles.english: Love this hole even more

subtitles.original: だっせ！
subtitles.english: Lame!

subtitles.original: Whoa! Look at this place!
subtitles.english: Whoa! Look at this place!

subtitles.original: I was not expecting to play a game in such a pretty place.
subtitles.english: I was not expecting to play a game in such a pretty place.

subtitles.original: And I wonder what kind of game it's going to be... Hmm.
subtitles.english: And I wonder what kind of game it's going to be... Hmm.

subtitles.original: Raora!
subtitles.english: Raora!

subtitles.original: This is your conscience!
subtitles.english: This is your conscience!

subtitles.original: Eh? My conscience? Do I have one?
subtitles.english: Eh? My conscience? Do I have one?

subtitles.original: Oh! Mori!
subtitles.english: Oh! Mori!

subtitles.original: Yo, it's your turn.
subtitles.english: Yo, it's your turn.

subtitles.original: Say something. Say something.
subtitles.english: Say something. Say something.

subtitles.original: Eh? Is that... Is that...
subtitles.english: Eh? Is that... Is that...

subtitles.original: Is that a ghost? What is that?
subtitles.english: Is that a ghost? What is that?

subtitles.original: Where is...? I can't see anyone.
subtitles.english: Where is...? I can't see anyone.

subtitles.original: Raora!
subtitles.english: Raora!

subtitles.original: Eh? Is that a dog?
subtitles.english: Eh? Is that a dog?

subtitles.original: Congrats Raora on your 3D debut!
subtitles.english: Congrats Raora on your 3D debut!

subtitles.original: We're so happy for you.
subtitles.english: We're so happy for you.

subtitles.original: Oh, thank you so much! I'm so happy!
subtitles.english: Oh, thank you so much! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: Well, as you may have assumed by our grand entrance...
subtitles.english: Well, as you may have assumed by our grand entrance...

subtitles.original: ...your opponents for this mini-game are, as you see...
subtitles.english: ...your opponents for this mini-game are, as you see...

subtitles.original: Mina-san, Mori Calliope from Hololive English Myth!
subtitles.english: Everyone, I'm Mori Calliope from Hololive English Myth!

subtitles.original: If you don't know me, now you do!
subtitles.english: If you don't know me, now you do!

subtitles.original: Konnichi-wa, this is Ouro Kronii from Hololive English Promise.
subtitles.english: Hello, this is Ouro Kronii from Hololive English Promise.

subtitles.original: And who could this beautiful woman be? Dare desu ka?
subtitles.english: And who could this beautiful woman be? Who is it?

subtitles.original: どっちこっち？こっち！指、指！指、指！
subtitles.english: Which way? This way! Finger, finger! Finger, finger!

subtitles.original: ホロライブから来ました戌神ころねです、よろしくね！
subtitles.english: I'm Inugami Korone from Hololive, nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: こんにちは！先輩、始めまして！今日は来てくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Hello! Seniors, nice to meet you! Thank you for coming today!

subtitles.original: お、日本語上手！
subtitles.english: Oh, your Japanese is good!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much Mori! What kind of game are we gonna play today?
subtitles.english: Thank you so much Mori! What kind of game are we gonna play today?

subtitles.original: Well, get ready!
subtitles.english: Well, get ready!

subtitles.original: Because it's time for one, two, three, say cheese!
subtitles.english: Because it's time for one, two, three, say cheese!
